references.approval_note: The generic distribution ships a specification, not unapproved local reference artwork. Generate and approve a local reference before production assets.
required_corrections: normal desks are true 2x2 complete-footprint workstations, not 1x1 desks scaled up
no missing tile corners or clipped edges, so office components can be stitched on the grid
chairman office is an exact 5x5 integer grid component with a 2x3 main desk/standing zone
heads are smaller than V2 while preserving the refined chibi-human look
programmer monitors face the worker/viewer correctly
animation source removes white halo around hair and hands
typing keeps hands anchored and moves only fingers
